text: Entering this space, I feel a curious anticipation—the intersection of intellect, design, and innovation is almost tangible. The glowing blue light, clean glass, and bold R+D signage signal a celebration of human ingenuity. I am intrigued by the invitation to ponder how minds, machines, and environments inform and shape one another. In a place dedicated to curiosity and experimentation, I feel alive to possibility, yet also reflective about the consequences of progress. I am both participant and observer.
